description: PRIVATE NGC group create-path SMOKE (hermetic, single-instance): drive l3_create_group with type='private' (groupType 'Private') and prove the private-create branch COMPLETES WITHOUT ERROR and the group is tracked in knownGroups. HONEST SCOPE (codex P2): this is a path smoke — it exercises the private branch of FfiChatService.createGroup that the public-only gates never reach (guarding against a crash/throw/regression there), but it does NOT assert a privacy-SPECIFIC observable: a private group enters knownGroups IDENTICALLY to a public one, and the read model does not surface privacy_state, so 'private vs public' is not distinguished here. A true privacy assertion (e.g. not DHT-announced / invite-only) needs a privacy/joinability field added to l3_dump_state — deferred. Self-cleans via teardown leave.
